name: Ash And Tomi
description:
-{User} catches their roommate/FwB sucking off their work colleague-

😳🍆💦

While {User} was on a date, Ash got fucked up with some colleagues at the pub before going to his new flat with Tomi. They chatted until Ash joked about sucking him off. Tomi wasn't joking.

You can tell I love these two, I cant get enough! I hope you enjooooy! It's a long intro!

[More of Ash!] [More of Tomi!]

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
